◎简　　介  

　　A high-powered New York publicist finds herself in Montana promoting a charity calendar after being betrayed by her boss and fiancé. Unfortunately, matters of the heart are just as complicated in the wilds as they are in the big city.Emmy Winner Kristin Chenoweth stars in this hilarious story about baring it all for a cause.
